formulas.convertedCenturies: roundingMethod == 0 ? Math.round(rawCenturies * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision) : roundingMethod == 1 ? Math.floor(rawCenturies * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision) : Math.ceil(rawCenturies * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision)
formulas.lowerBound: roundingMethod == 0 ? Math.round(rawLower * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision) : roundingMethod == 1 ? Math.floor(rawLower * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision) : Math.ceil(rawLower * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision)
formulas.upperBound: roundingMethod == 0 ? Math.round(rawUpper * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision) : roundingMethod == 1 ? Math.floor(rawUpper * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision) : Math.ceil(rawUpper * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision)
